Tax File Number Declaration
ATO form — your details have been pre-filled from Step 1
🔒 Your TFN is sensitive information. This form is submitted securely to a restricted folder only accessible by TER payroll staff.
📄 Tax File Number Declaration (ATO NAT 3092)
Declaration
By ticking below I declare that the information I have provided in this TFN Declaration is true and correct. I understand that it is an offence to make a false or misleading statement.
💰
Superannuation Nomination
Nominate your super fund for employer contributions
🔒 Your superannuation details are stored securely and only accessible by TER payroll staff.
Your Super Fund Details
📄 Super Nomination Form (ATO NAT 8676) — for your reference
Declaration
I declare that the information I have provided about my superannuation fund is true and correct, and I nominate this fund to receive employer superannuation contributions on my behalf.
🚗
Vehicle Use Agreement
Please read the full agreement before signing
📄 Top End Resources — Vehicle Use Agreement (Ver 2.1)
Sign-Off
I have read, understood, and agree to comply with the requirements outlined in the Top End Resources Vehicle Use Agreement. I understand that breach of this agreement may result in disciplinary action including termination of employment.
📋
Fair Work Information Statement
Mandatory reading for all new employees in Australia
📄 Fair Work Information Statement — Fair Work Ombudsman
Acknowledgement
I acknowledge that I have received and read the Fair Work Information Statement as required under the Fair Work Act 2009.
💳
Banking Card Agreement (Optional)
Complete only if you have been issued a company banking card
📄 Top End Resources — Company Banking Card Use Agreement
Cardholder Acknowledgement
I have read, understood, and agree to the conditions outlined in the Top End Resources Company Banking Card Use Agreement. I understand that misuse may result in disciplinary action including termination.
🌏
Indigenous Status Declaration (Optional)
For employees claiming Indigenous Employment Provisional Sum eligibility
This declaration is only required if you identify as Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander and wish to be considered for IEPS eligibility. It is completely optional.
Statutory Declaration
I solemnly and sincerely declare that: (a) I am of Australian Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander descent; AND (b) I have previously and consistently in my day-to-day life been known to be and/or identified as an Australian Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander. This declaration is true and I know it is an offence to make a statutory declaration knowing it is false.
🎉
Onboarding Complete!
All required items have been submitted. Your information has been securely saved to Top End Resources' systems. A member of the TER team will be in touch shortly.
Questions? Contact admin@ternt.com.au
